title: Billing Testing Coverage (e2e + manual smoke)
coverageTarget: 100% functional + 100% line on apps/api billing services/routes/webhooks and packages/billing — with documented true-impossible-in-e2e exceptions in T-143-55.

phases.phase-0: Infrastructure (foundational, blocks everything) — includes deletion of deprecated 2025-11 tests
phases.phase-1-A: Critical e2e flows (15 financial flows including free signup, API idempotency, webhook concurrency)
phases.phase-1-C: Prod manual smoke — 3 most critical flows (go-live gate)
phases.phase-2-A: High-priority e2e flows (trials, cancel/pause/resume, dunning, refund/dispute, D4 authorized, MP error handling, grace/plan-lifecycle)
phases.phase-3-A: Important e2e flows (promo, sponsorship, overrides, cache, admin ops, exchange rate, D1..D8, plan migration matrix, multi-currency)
phases.phase-3-BD: Staging smoke for Phase 3 + Sentry filter tuning
phases.phase-4: Observability + runbooks + dashboards + docs + CI tuning + 100% coverage report with exception list

tasks.title: Fix apps/api/.env.test credentials + reconcile DB URL source of truth
tasks.notes: Two issues: (1) .env.test uses hospeda:hospeda but docker postgres has hospeda_user:hospeda_pass; (2) setup/test-database.ts reads TEST_DB_URL/USER/PASSWORD/etc instead of HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL, creating two sources of truth. Decision: make HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL the SINGLE source, remove TEST_DB_* fallback path from test-database.ts (no backcompat — per user OK 2026-05-18).

tasks.title: Push Drizzle schema to hospeda_test database
tasks.notes: pnpm --filter @repo/db db:push with TEST_DB_URL pointing at hospeda_test. Creates all billing tables in the test DB.

tasks.title: Apply postgres-extras (triggers, MVs, JSONB CHECKs) to hospeda_test
tasks.notes: Run packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh against hospeda_test. Required by ADR-017 — Drizzle push alone is incomplete.

tasks.title: Minimal seed: 2 plans (cheap + expensive) with monthly + annual prices
tasks.notes: Seed billing_plans (UUID id) + billing_prices for monthly + annual. Used by every e2e flow. Idempotent — re-runnable.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/mp-stub.ts (createMercadoPagoAdapter stub)
tasks.notes: Stub factory returning canned responses for ALL MP adapter operations: preferences.create/get, subscriptions.create/update/cancel, payments.get/refund/list, customers.create/get/update, preapproval.create/update/cancel/list. Configurable per-test via setMpStubResponse(operation, response | error). Supports success, 4xx, 5xx, timeout, and malformed-response modes. Used by T-143-59 to exercise error branches.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-fixtures.ts
tasks.notes: Reusable fixture data: sample MP webhook payloads (idempotent, signed), preference responses, payment objects, customer records. Mirrors the shape of real MP responses captured from sandbox.

tasks.title: Build apps/api/test/e2e/helpers/billing-factories.ts (DB factories)
tasks.notes: createTestUser, createTestCustomer, createTestSubscription, createTestAddon — generate clean DB rows with predictable IDs. Reset helper for between-test cleanup.

tasks.title: Smoke e2e test: GET /billing/plans returns seeded plans
tasks.notes: Single-test sanity check that infra works end-to-end before writing real flows. If this fails, fix infra before proceeding. Lives at apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/smoke-plans.test.ts (new, not the deprecated subscription-purchase.test.ts).

tasks.title: E2E: annual checkout flow (preference → payment.approved webhook → subscription active)
tasks.notes: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/annual-checkout.test.ts. Validates entitlements load after activation.

tasks.title: E2E: monthly checkout flow (preapproval setup → first charge → subscription active)
tasks.notes: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/monthly-checkout.test.ts. Preapproval-based recurring flow distinct from one-time annual.

tasks.title: E2E: plan upgrade with delta calculation
tasks.notes: plan-upgrade.test.ts. Active subscription on cheap plan → upgrade to expensive → assert prorated delta charge + entitlements updated immediately.

tasks.title: E2E: plan downgrade scheduling (queued for next cycle)
tasks.notes: plan-downgrade.test.ts. Active on expensive → schedule downgrade → assert pending change row + entitlements unchanged until cycle boundary.

tasks.title: E2E: downgrade cron execution applies queued change
tasks.notes: downgrade-cron.test.ts. Setup queued downgrade → advance virtual clock → trigger cron → assert plan flipped + entitlements recalculated + entitlement cache invalidated.

tasks.title: E2E: addon one-time purchase
tasks.notes: addon-purchase.test.ts. Preference → payment.approved → addon credit granted + JSONB CHECK constraint validated (no schema drift).

tasks.title: E2E: webhook idempotency (duplicate event ID)
tasks.notes: webhook-idempotency.test.ts. POST same MP webhook event twice → second call is no-op, no duplicate subscription/payment row, response 200.

tasks.title: E2E: webhook signature validation rejects unsigned/bad-sig
tasks.notes: webhook-signature.test.ts. Send webhook without signature, with bad signature, with replayed timestamp → all rejected 401 + Sentry event captured.

tasks.title: E2E: failed payment webhook handler
tasks.notes: webhook-failed-payment.test.ts. payment.rejected webhook → subscription flips to past_due, dunning queue entry created, user notification dispatched.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription activation — annual + monthly post-payment
tasks.notes: subscription-activation.test.ts. Covers both flows: payment.approved → subscription row active + current_period_end set correctly + cache primed.

tasks.title: E2E: entitlement load post-activation (covers SPEC-141 unit gap)
tasks.notes: entitlement-load.test.ts. Closes the structural gap from SPEC-141 — proves real activation produces real entitlements that real /entitlements/* endpoints return correctly.

tasks.title: Author docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md — Phase 1 sections + MP test users
tasks.notes: Steps for each Phase 1 flow against MP sandbox, with per-user assignment (clean-state vs persisted). Includes pass/fail recording grid.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 1 staging smokes (12 flows) and record results
tasks.notes: User executes the staging checklist end-to-end against real MP sandbox. Sign-off recorded in checklist. Covers all 15 Phase 1 flows including free signup, API idempotency, webhook concurrency.

tasks.title: Author docs/prod-smoke-checklist.md + rollback procedure
tasks.notes: Abbreviated checklist for 3 prod flows (annual + monthly + addon). Rollback procedure documented for each: how to refund/cancel/revert if smoke fails.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 1 prod smokes (annual + monthly + addon, small charges)
tasks.notes: User executes prod checklist with real production credentials and small charges. This is the GO-LIVE GATE for real-money charging.

tasks.title: E2E: trial activation
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (activation case). User signs up with eligible plan → trial subscription row + trial_ends_at set + entitlements active.

tasks.title: E2E: trial expiration cron
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (expiration case). Advance clock past trial_ends_at → cron downgrades to free + entitlements revoked + user notified.

tasks.title: E2E: trial → paid conversion before expiration
tasks.notes: trial-lifecycle.test.ts (conversion case). Mid-trial checkout → paid subscription active + trial_ends_at cleared + no double-billing.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription cancel
tasks.notes: subscription-cancel.test.ts. Active → cancel → access continues until current_period_end + no further billing + MP preapproval paused.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription pause
tasks.notes: subscription-pause-resume.test.ts (pause case). Active → pause → entitlements revoked + MP preapproval paused + paused_at set.

tasks.title: E2E: subscription resume
tasks.notes: subscription-pause-resume.test.ts (resume case). Paused → resume → entitlements restored + MP preapproval reactivated + next-charge scheduled.

tasks.title: E2E: dunning cron retries failed payments and ages out
tasks.notes: dunning-cron.test.ts. past_due subscription → cron retries with exponential backoff → after N failures, subscription canceled + user notified.

tasks.title: E2E: addon expiration cron
tasks.notes: addon-expiration-cron.test.ts. addon past expires_at → cron revokes credit + JSONB metadata updated + cache invalidated.

tasks.title: E2E: addon cancel + subscription price recalc
tasks.notes: addon-cancel-recalc.test.ts. Subscription with addon → cancel addon → next-period charge amount recalculated correctly.

tasks.title: E2E: authorized payment (D4 flow — pre-authorize then capture)
tasks.notes: authorized-payment.test.ts. Pre-authorize on signup → capture on conversion → assert no double-charge + MP authorization-id tracked.

tasks.title: E2E: refund flow
tasks.notes: refund.test.ts. Active subscription → refund payment via admin → MP refund webhook → payment row flipped + entitlements end-dated.

tasks.title: E2E: dispute flow (chargeback webhook)
tasks.notes: dispute.test.ts. MP chargeback webhook → subscription frozen + admin notified + Sentry event captured.

tasks.title: Append Phase 2 sections to docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md
tasks.notes: Trial lifecycle, cancel/pause/resume, dunning, addon expiry/cancel, authorized payment, refund, dispute sections.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 2 staging smokes and record results
tasks.notes: Real MP sandbox execution of Phase 2 flows (12 base + MP error handling + grace/plan-lifecycle). Sign-off recorded.

tasks.title: E2E: promo code apply / validate / expire
tasks.notes: promo-code.test.ts. Exhaustive cases: valid code applies discount, expired code rejected, max-uses overflow rejected, percent-off vs fixed-off, code applied then payment canceled (code use-count not consumed), code applied then payment failed (use-count not consumed), code stacking attempt rejected, code applied to ineligible plan rejected, code case-insensitive match, code with min-purchase threshold.

tasks.title: E2E: sponsorship grant / revoke
tasks.notes: OBSOLETE — task notes describe a gift-subscription system (sponsor user grants entitlements to other users with cron expiry + precedence over paid subs) that does NOT exist in the hospeda codebase. The `sponsorships` table + service is CRUD for sponsored ads/posts (a sponsor user pays to feature their own post/event/destination). There is no grant/revoke flow, no sponsorship cron, no entitlement integration. CRUD coverage already lives in unit tests (sponsorship.service.test.ts, sponsorship.model.test.ts). Closed without tests; gap documented in engram `bug/sponsorship-task-notes-misalignment`.
tasks.obsoletedReason: Task notes describe a feature that does not exist in the codebase; CRUD already unit-tested.

tasks.title: E2E: customer override apply / expire
tasks.notes: customer-override.test.ts. Exhaustive cases: admin sets override → applies on read, override expiry boundary → reverts to plan default, override stacks with sponsorship (precedence rules), override vs base plan conflict resolution, override removed mid-cycle, override on user without active subscription.

tasks.title: E2E: entitlement cache hit/miss/invalidation/TTL
tasks.notes: entitlement-cache.test.ts. Exhaustive cases: cache miss → DB hit → primed, cache hit on second read, TTL boundary expiry, manual invalidation on subscription change/cancel/pause/upgrade/downgrade, invalidation on override add/remove, invalidation on sponsorship grant/revoke, cache stampede protection (concurrent reads on miss), Redis down → degrade to DB (no error).

tasks.title: E2E: admin billing ops (list / customer detail / subscription manual ops / addon manual ops)
tasks.notes: admin-billing-ops.test.ts. Every /api/v1/admin/billing/* endpoint validated: list endpoints (plans, customers, subscriptions, addons, promo-codes, sponsorships, overrides, exchange-rates, cron-jobs) with pagination + filters + sort; customer detail; manual subscription ops (activate/cancel/pause/resume/refund); manual addon ops (grant/revoke); manual cron trigger; permission enforcement (PermissionEnum, not roles); admin actor required.

tasks.title: E2E: exchange rate cron
tasks.notes: exchange-rate-cron.test.ts. Cron fetches latest ARS/USD/BRL → updates billing_exchange_rates row → next checkout uses fresh rate.

tasks.title: E2E: secondary auth/redirect/cancel flows (D1..D8)
tasks.notes: auth-redirect-cancel-flows.test.ts. Eight smaller flows: D1 success-redirect, D2 failure-redirect, D3 pending-redirect, D4 cancel-from-MP, D5 browser-back-during-checkout, D6 double-submit, D7 session-expired-during-checkout, D8 anonymous-checkout-attempt (must redirect to login preserving intent).

tasks.title: Append Phase 3 sections to docs/staging-smoke-checklist.md
tasks.notes: Promo codes, sponsorship, overrides, cache, admin ops, exchange rate, D1..D8 sections.

tasks.title: Execute Phase 3 staging smokes and record results
tasks.notes: Real MP sandbox execution including plan migration matrix and multi-currency flows. Sign-off recorded.

tasks.title: Sentry filter tuning for promo/sponsorship/override noise
tasks.notes: Phase 3 flows produce expected errors (expired codes, revoked sponsorships). Filter these out of Sentry to avoid alert fatigue.

tasks.title: Author docs/billing-runbooks.md
tasks.notes: Operational runbooks: failed-webhook-handler triage, MP signature failure response, cron failure recovery, dunning-cron stuck recovery, refund procedure, dispute procedure, manual subscription rescue.

tasks.title: Sentry alerts: failed-payment webhook handler + MP signature validation failure
tasks.notes: Two alerts. Threshold + notification target documented. Go-live gate requirement.

tasks.title: Sentry alerts: cron job failure + dunning cron failure
tasks.notes: Two alerts. Threshold + notification target documented. Go-live gate requirement.

tasks.title: Billing health dashboard (Sentry / metrics view)
tasks.notes: Dashboard surfacing active subscriptions, MRR, webhook error rate, cron last-run timestamps, signature failures (24h).

tasks.title: Author docs/mp-test-cards-reference.md
tasks.notes: MP-published test card numbers + cvv + expiry combos for approve/reject/pending/dispute outcomes. Referenced by smoke checklists.

tasks.title: Author docs/e2e-infrastructure-design.md + docs/mp-stub-architecture.md
tasks.notes: Two design docs: overall e2e infra (test DB, fixtures, factories) + the mp-stub contract (what it stubs, what it does not). For future maintainers.

tasks.title: Add CLAUDE.md rule: billing-touching PR must execute manual smoke checklist
tasks.notes: Rule added to root CLAUDE.md (or relevant section). Per engram #532 decision Q1.

tasks.title: Coverage verification: 100% line + functional coverage with documented exceptions
tasks.notes: Two-part verification. (1) Run vitest --coverage scoped to apps/api/src/services/*billing*, apps/api/src/routes/billing/*, apps/api/src/routes/webhooks/mercadopago/*, packages/billing/src/**. Target 100%. Each unreached line gets either an additional test or a /* istanbul ignore */ with a one-line justification (must match a true-impossible category: real MP card internals, real fraud detection ML, non-deterministic network races). (2) Functional audit: cross-check docs/billing-runbooks.md against the e2e test inventory — every documented flow + cron + webhook + admin op must have ≥ 1 test reference. Deliverable: docs/coverage-audit-2026.md with the exception list.

tasks.title: CI tuning for billing e2e (parallelism, time budget, isolation)
tasks.notes: Configure vitest project for billing e2e. Test isolation (DB transaction rollback per test or schema-per-test). Time budget for the suite. Surface in CI report.

tasks.title: Delete deprecated billing e2e tests + E2E-ANALYSIS-REPORT.md (deadweight from 2025-11)
tasks.notes: Files: apps/api/test/e2e/flows/billing/payment-flow.test.ts (28K — soft-skips when billing not configured), subscription-purchase.test.ts (16K — only GETs /billing/plans), sponsorship-purchase.test.ts (16K), apps/api/test/e2e/E2E-ANALYSIS-REPORT.md (13K — refers to /api/v1/subscriptions and /api/v1/payments routes that no longer exist post three-tier refactor). User OK 2026-05-18: delete and rewrite from scratch aligned to new state.json flows. Sandbox tests (apps/api/test/e2e/sandbox/*) are KEPT — they target real MP sandbox and serve Workstream B.

tasks.title: E2E: free plan signup + entitlements (no payment flow)
tasks.notes: free-plan-signup.test.ts. New user with no checkout → free-tier entitlements active immediately + no billing_customer row required initially + upgrade-to-paid path from free works. Edge: free-tier rate limits enforced.

tasks.title: E2E: MercadoPago API error handling (stubbed 4xx / 5xx / timeout / malformed)
tasks.notes: mp-error-handling.test.ts. Use mp-stub.ts error modes (T-143-05) to exercise every error branch in packages/billing/src + apps/api/src/services/*billing*: MP returns 400 (validation), 401 (auth), 403 (forbidden), 404 (not found), 422 (business rule), 429 (rate limit), 500 (server), 502/503/504 (gateway), network timeout, malformed JSON. Per response: assert no partial DB write, user gets actionable error, Sentry captures correct context, retry policy (if any) is followed.

tasks.title: E2E: idempotency keys at protected billing API level
tasks.notes: api-idempotency.test.ts. Distinct from webhook idempotency (T-143-15). Tests X-Idempotency-Key header on POST /protected/billing/checkout, /protected/billing/addons/purchase, etc: same key + same body → identical response, no duplicate DB row; same key + different body → conflict 409; missing key → accepted but warned in response.

tasks.title: E2E: plan migration matrix (free↔paid, cycle changes, tier moves)
tasks.notes: plan-migration-matrix.test.ts. Matrix beyond simple upgrade/downgrade: free → paid (no proration), paid → free (cancel-to-free), monthly → annual same tier (proration + cycle realign), annual → monthly same tier (queued to renewal), tier-up monthly → tier-up annual (combined upgrade + cycle change), paid plan with addon → paid plan without addon (addon transfer or revoke).

tasks.title: E2E: multi-currency price selection (ARS / USD / BRL per customer)
tasks.notes: multi-currency.test.ts. Customer with ARS locale → plan ARS price selected; USD locale → USD price; BRL locale → BRL price. Edge: plan with only USD price + customer ARS → fallback to USD with FX conversion using latest billing_exchange_rates row. Stale exchange rate (cron didn't run today) → warning + use last known rate. Currency mismatch between subscription and addon → error.

tasks.title: E2E: grace period past current_period_end + plan disabled while subscription active
tasks.notes: grace-and-plan-lifecycle.test.ts. (a) Subscription reaches current_period_end and renewal cron has not fired yet → entitlements remain active within N-hour grace window + Sentry alert if grace exceeded. (b) Admin disables a plan while customer subscriptions are active → existing subs keep entitlements until cycle end, no new signups on that plan, existing renewals follow migration policy.

tasks.title: E2E: webhook concurrency (duplicate concurrent + out-of-order delivery)
tasks.notes: webhook-concurrency.test.ts. (a) Same event ID delivered twice concurrently (parallel POSTs) → only one DB mutation, both return 200, no race-induced duplicate row (rely on DB unique constraint on event_id). (b) Out-of-order delivery: payment.approved arrives BEFORE preference.created/preapproval.authorized in the same flow → reconciliation logic catches up correctly without ending in inconsistent state.

tasks.title: Infra: fix cross-file test isolation in e2e suite (parallel runs drop pool + add schema preflight)
tasks.notes: Reproduced 2026-05-19 during T-143-11 sub-commit 1: running `pnpm test:e2e <fileA> <fileB>` with two or more e2e billing files together fails every test in both files with `Failed query: select id from billing_plans where name = $1` even though each file passes in isolation. Root cause hypothesis: each test file's `beforeAll → testDb.setup()` calls `initializeDb(pool)` which mutates a process-global singleton; when vitest reuses the Node worker (singleFork: true) across files, the second file's setup wins and the first file's afterAll teardown closes a pool that has been replaced — subsequent queries in the leftover hooks hit the closed pool. Additionally, the test DB schema can be silently dropped by external commands (other worktrees, `pnpm db:fresh-dev` against the wrong DSN) and there is no startup guard that verifies the schema exists before tests run. Two-part fix: (1) make `testDb.setup()` idempotent and detect/skip when the global pool already points at the same DSN, OR scope the pool per-file via a vitest globalSetup. (2) Add a schema-existence preflight in `setup/test-database.ts` that throws a clear `pnpm db:push --target=test` instruction if billing_plans/etc are missing, instead of failing the first query mid-test. Until this lands, the canonical commands stay: run one file at a time with `pnpm test:e2e <file>` and rebuild schema via `HOSPEDA_DATABASE_URL=...hospeda_test pnpm db:push && packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh <dsn>` after any external DB reset.
